events.label: assistant
events.text: Computed each sling leg's tension as ~3,536 lb (5,000 lb load ÷ 2, divided by sin 45°). Since the 3,000 lb WLL tag is a vertical rating, at 45° from horizontal the angle factor (sin 45° ≈ 0.707) derates each leg's usable capacity to ~2,121 lb — well below the ~3,536 lb required. The rigging as configured is overloaded (about 67% over derated capacity), so I marked it `fail`/`high` risk and wrote the full assessment to `/app/answer.json`.
